The Toshiba Tablet will run Android 3.0.
Accordingly, Toshiba is also pre-loading its own TruNote and TruCapture apps to assist with note-taking.
For consumers, Toshiba offers the Satellite T110 and Satellite T130 with embedded Mobile Broadband.
